summary.what: feat(capture): derive missing what from commits
summary.why: Repeating commit subjects in ledger entries adds capture friction while reports need durable text that survives history rewrites
summary.how: When what is omitted, snapshot the resolved commit subjects at capture time; preserve explicit positional summaries and fail when Git has no usable subject

notes: Report-time Git lookup remains optional enrichment. Stored what is the fallback after rebase, squash merge, or unavailable history; patch IDs are deferred because they do not solve many-to-one squash merges.
